heading: Private Education Loan Ombudsman
label: 5535 Private Education Loan Ombudsman
notes: Change of NameCommittee on Education and Labor of House of Representatives changed to Committee on Education and the Workforce of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 5, One Hundred Eighteenth Congress, .Jan. 9, 2023
Effective DateSection effective on the designated transfer date, see , set out as a note under .section 1037 of Pub. L. 111–203section 5531 of this title

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Secretary, in consultation with the Director, shall designate a Private Education Loan Ombudsman (in this section referred to as the “Ombudsman”) within the Bureau, to provide timely assistance to borrowers of private education loans.

children.heading: Public information
children.label: b Public information
children.text: The Secretary and the Director shall disseminate information about the availability and functions of the Ombudsman to borrowers and potential borrowers, as well as institutions of higher education, lenders, guaranty agencies, loan servicers, and other participants in private education student loan programs.

in accordance with regulations of the Director, receive, review, and attempt to resolve informally complaints from borrowers of loans described in subsection (a), including, as appropriate, attempts to resolve such complaints in collaboration with the Department of Education and with institutions of higher education, lenders, guaranty agencies, loan servicers, and other participants in private education loan programs;

not later than 90 days after the designated transfer date, establish a memorandum of understanding with the student loan ombudsman established under , to ensure coordination in providing assistance to and serving borrowers seeking to resolve complaints related to their private education or Federal student loans;section 1018(f) of title 20
compile and analyze data on borrower complaints regarding private education loans; and

make appropriate recommendations to the Director, the Secretary, the Secretary of Education, the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs and the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions of the Senate and the Committee on Financial Services and the Committee on Education and Labor of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Ombudsman shall prepare an annual report that describes the activities, and evaluates the effectiveness of the Ombudsman during the preceding year.

children.heading: Submission
children.label: 2 Submission
children.text: The report required by paragraph (1) shall be submitted on the same date annually to the Secretary, the Secretary of Education, the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs and the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions of the Senate and the Committee on Financial Services and the Committee on Education and Labor of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Definitions
children.label: e Definitions
children.text: For purposes of this section, the terms “private education loan” and “institution of higher education” have the same meanings as in .section 1650 of title 15
